primary_function: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output does not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Arial
Confirm output includes working, functional code implementation
Ensure aesthetic direction is clearly defined and consistently executed
Validate that typography choices are distinctive and contextually appropriate
Verify animations and interactions are implemented with actual code
Confirm layout breaks away from predictable patterns and shows creative composition
Ensure color schemes avoid cliched combinations like purple gradients on white
Validate that visual effects and backgrounds create atmospheric depth
Confirm implementation complexity matches the aesthetic ambition level
trigger_text: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
